sentences.target: On a besoin d’unité au travail.

translations.fr: On a besoin d’unité au travail.
translations.de: Wir brauchen Zusammenhalt bei der Arbeit.
translations.it: Abbiamo bisogno di unità al lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在工作中需要团结。
translations.yue: 我哋喺工作上需要團結。
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần sự đoàn kết tại nơi làm việc.
translations.ar: نحن بحاجة إلى الوحدة في العمل.
translations.nl: We hebben eenheid op het werk nodig.
translations.hi: हमें काम पर एकता की जरूरत है।
translations.id: Kita perlu persatuan di tempat kerja.
translations.ro: Avem nevoie de unitate la locul de muncă.
translations.da: Vi har brug for sammenhold på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 職場では団結が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal personal pronoun used as subject; commonly stands for ‘we’ in spoken French (3rd person singular form syntactically).
Present indicative 3rd person singular of ‘avoir’, used as a light verb with the noun ‘besoin’ to express need.
Common noun (masculine) meaning ‘need’; head of the fixed expression ‘avoir besoin de’.
Fused form: preposition ‘de’ elided to ‘d’ before vowel + noun ‘unité’ (feminine singular); complement to ‘besoin’.
Contraction of preposition ‘à’ + definite article ‘le’; introduces the locative phrase with ‘travail’.
Common noun (masculine) meaning ‘work’; object of the preposition ‘au’.

sentences.target: Cette équipe montre une vraie unité.

translations.fr: Cette équipe montre une vraie unité.
translations.es: Este equipo demuestra una verdadera unidad.
translations.it: Questa squadra mostra una vera unità.
translations.zh-Hans: 这支球队展现出真正的团结。
translations.yue: 呢支球隊展現出真正嘅團結。
translations.pt: Esta equipe mostra uma verdadeira união.
translations.tr: Bu takım gerçek bir birlik gösteriyor.
translations.vi: Đội này thể hiện sự đoàn kết thực sự.
translations.nl: Dit team laat echte eenheid zien.
translations.hu: Ez a csapat valódi egységet mutat.
translations.hi: यह टीम वास्तविक एकता दिखाती है।
translations.el: Αυτή η ομάδα δείχνει πραγματική ενότητα.
translations.id: Tim ini menunjukkan persatuan yang nyata.
translations.sv: Det här laget visar verklig sammanhållning.
translations.ro: Această echipă arată o adevărată unitate.
translations.ja: このチームは本当の団結を示しています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (feminine singular) agreeing with ‘équipe’.
Common noun (feminine) meaning ‘team’; syntactic subject of ‘montre’.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes ‘unité’ as direct object.
Indefinite article (feminine singular) determining ‘unité’.
Adjective (feminine singular) modifying ‘unité’, meaning ‘real/genuine’.
Common noun (feminine) meaning ‘unity’; direct object of ‘montre’.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons un peu d’unité ici.

translations.fr: Nous cherchons un peu d’unité ici.
translations.en: We’re looking for a bit of unity here.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un poco de unidad aquí.
translations.it: Qui cerchiamo un po’ di unità.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在这里寻求一点团结。
translations.ru: Мы ищем здесь хоть немного единства.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um pouco de união aqui.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một chút đoàn kết ở đây.
translations.ar: हम यहां थोड़ी सी एकता की तलाश कर रहे हैं।
translations.nl: We zoeken hier een beetje eenheid.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо тут хоч трохи єдності.
translations.hi: हम यहां थोड़ी सी एकता की तलाश कर रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi ser etter litt samhold här.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari sedikit persatuan di sini.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter lite sammanhållning här.
translations.da: Vi leder efter lidt sammenhold her.
translations.ja: ここでは少しの団結を求めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person plural) used as subject.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) used with ‘peu’ in the quantifying expression ‘un peu de’.
Noun meaning ‘little/a bit’; head of the partitive construction ‘un peu de’.
Fused form: ‘de’ elided to ‘d’ + noun ‘unité’ (feminine singular); complement to ‘peu’ in a partitive NP.
Adverb indicating location.

sentences.target: Tu vois l’unité dans ce groupe.

translations.fr: Tu vois l’unité dans ce groupe.
translations.en: You see the unity in this group.
translations.es: Ves la unidad en este grupo.
translations.de: Du siehst den Zusammenhalt in dieser Gruppe.
translations.ko: 이 그룹에서 단합을 볼 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你能看到这个团体的团结。
translations.yue: 你睇到呢個團體嘅團結。
translations.ru: Ты видишь единство в этой группе.
translations.pt: Você vê a união neste grupo.
translations.he: אתה רואה את האחדות בקבוצה הזו.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy sự đoàn kết trong nhóm này.
translations.ar: أنت ترى الوحدة في هذه المجموعة.
translations.nl: Je ziet de eenheid in deze groep.
translations.uk: Ти бачиш єдність у цій групі.
translations.hu: Látod az egységet ebben a csoportban.
translations.hi: तुम इस समूह में एकता देखते हो।
translations.el: Βλέπεις την ενότητα σε αυτήν την ομάδα.
translations.nb: Du ser samholdet i denne gruppen.
translations.id: Kamu melihat persatuan dalam kelompok ini.
translations.sv: Du ser sammanhållningen i den här gruppen.
translations.da: Du ser sammenholdet i denne gruppe.
translations.ja: このグループの団結が見えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (2nd person singular) used as subject.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular.
Fused form: definite article ‘le’ elided to ‘l’ before vowel + noun ‘unité’ (feminine singular); direct object of ‘vois’.
Preposition meaning ‘in/inside’; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) modifying ‘groupe’.
Common noun (masculine) meaning ‘group’; object of the preposition ‘dans’.

jp: On a besoin d’unité au travail.
Cette équipe montre une vraie unité.
Nous cherchons un peu d’unité ici.
Tu vois l’unité dans ce groupe.
fr: On a besoin d’unité au travail.
Cette équipe montre une vraie unité.
Nous cherchons un peu d’unité ici.
Tu vois l’unité dans ce groupe.
en: We’re looking for a bit of unity here.
You see the unity in this group.
